历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 16774 → 16936 → 18473 → 21997 → 16067. From 2021 to 2024, rankings continuously declined (cumulative about 5200 places), but in 2025, they rebounded significantly to 16067, moving forward by about 5930 places compared to 2024, showing large fluctuations; enrollment: 800 in 2021, 775 in 2022, 769 in 2023, 748 in 2024, 700 in 2025, gradually decreasing year by year; 2026 plan is 796, an increase of 96 (+13.7%) over 2025, marking the first significant expansion in nearly 5 years.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science 2026 ranking approximately 56th, with recent rankings stable in the 48–61 range; reputation file does not include evaluation of this university; Douyin popularity not in top 100; no abnormal admission records, overall attention is average.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors continue to be highly recommended, closely matching the university's Physics Category enrollment majors; total examinees in Hubei Province in 2026 approximately 393,700, slightly increased from 2025, with Physics Category estimated at about 251,400; 2025 Physics Category undergraduate batch cutoff 426 points, down 11 points from 2024's 437; the university is located in Wuhan, a provincial institution, with Physics Category local enrollment of about 700–800, strong willingness of local candidates to apply.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant rebound in 2025 rankings indicating increased attractiveness, the 13.7% enrollment expansion in 2026 slightly easing competition, and the sustained high popularity of computer/electronic information and other hot majors attracting candidates, the range is 16939–17939.
